styleSuffix: Crisp cozy pixel art for a browser idle farming game, top-down orthographic view, readable 16x16 or 32x32 sprite language, limited but varied color palette, clean separated sprites, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI mockup frame.

sheets.prompt: Create a square pixel-art terrain tileset for a cozy idle farm game. Include grass, tilled dry soil, wet soil, seeded soil, dirt path, stone path, shallow water, bridge plank, wooden fence horizontal and vertical pieces, tree, stump, rock, flower patch, sign post, well, compost pile, and simple field border tiles. Arrange as a clean evenly spaced spritesheet with visible padding between tiles.

sheets.grid: 6 crops x 5 growth stages conceptual grid
sheets.prompt: Create a square pixel-art crop growth spritesheet for wheat, carrot, tomato, strawberry, corn, and pumpkin. Show five stages for each crop: seed, sprout, small plant, mature plant, harvest-ready. Arrange in a clean grid with one crop per row and growth progressing left to right. Keep each sprite isolated with even padding.

Create a square pixel-art spritesheet for a cozy idle farm. Include a farmer character facing down, up, left, and right; small walk cycle hints; chicken, cow, sheep, bee box, scarecrow, barn, chicken coop, seed shop stall, silo, mailbox, and order board. Keep all sprites separated, readable, and suitable for browser game use.

Create a square pixel-art UI icon sheet for an idle farming game. Include coin, seed packet, wheat bundle, carrot, tomato, strawberry, corn, pumpkin, watering can, hoe, sickle, basket, clock, upgrade arrow, auto-harvest gear, market order crate, XP star, rain cloud, sun, fertilizer bag, storage chest, and premium-looking but non-monetized gem. Clean isolated icons, no numbers, no letters.

Create a completely original main farmer character model sheet for production use. The character is Miri Rowan: warm tan skin, short auburn hair, teal kerchief, cream work shirt, moss green overalls with brass buttons, red neck scarf, tan boots, hip seed pouch, tiny leaf-shaped brooch. Show three evenly spaced full-body views: front, side, and back. Neutral standing pose, consistent proportions and outfit details across all views, plain light background, no labels. Do not copy or reference any existing game, anime, manga, or franchise character.

sheets.grid: 4 rows x 4 columns; down, left, right, up walk cycles
sheets.prompt: Create a completely original pixel-art walking cycle spritesheet for the same original farmer character Miri Rowan: teal kerchief, short auburn hair, cream work shirt, moss green overalls, red neck scarf, tan boots, hip seed pouch. Arrange as a clean 4 rows x 4 columns grid. Rows: walk down, walk left, walk right, walk up. Columns: idle step, left foot, idle step, right foot. Keep character proportions, outfit, colors, and silhouette consistent in every frame. Plain light background, no labels. Do not copy or reference any existing game, anime, manga, or franchise character.

sheets.grid: 6 rows x 4 columns; idle, hoe, water, sow, harvest, carry
sheets.prompt: Create a completely original pixel-art farming action animation spritesheet for the same original farmer character Miri Rowan: teal kerchief, short auburn hair, cream work shirt, moss green overalls, red neck scarf, tan boots, hip seed pouch. Arrange as a clean 6 rows x 4 columns grid. Rows: idle breathing facing down, hoe soil side-facing, watering can side-facing, sow seeds facing down, harvest pull facing down, carry basket facing down. Columns: anticipation, action, contact or peak, recovery. Keep readable silhouettes, strong tool arcs, and consistent outfit details. Plain light background, no labels. Do not copy or reference any existing game, anime, manga, or franchise character.
